text.title: Policy as Code: OPA, Kyverno, and Admission Control Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the target platform Kubernetes AND does the cluster have admission webhooks reachable?

conclusion.verdict: Use IAM / network ACLs / Terraform Sentinel for non-K8s estate.

branch.question: Do you need policy reach beyond K8s (Terraform, API gateway, CI gates)?

conclusion.verdict: OPA + Gatekeeper in cluster; OPA + Conftest in CI; Rego shared

text.example: kubernetes=true → multi_system=false → Kyverno + Audit-first + GitOps. References rule audit-first-then-enforce.
